description: This file defines possessive constructions and vowel contraction rules in Njo Viri (Balanda). Balanda distinguishes between intrinsic possession (body parts, name) and non-intrinsic possession (objects, external belongings). Contraction occurs when vowels meet at word boundaries.

general_principle.structure: Balanda marks possession differently depending on whether the noun is intrinsically possessed (body parts, name) or externally possessed (objects, belongings). Vowel contraction applies when adjacent vowels meet.

personal_pronouns.notes: ne | ŋo | ni | dhuu/danda | dha | ndi

possessive_formation.notes: Personal pronouns do NOT mark possession by themselves. | Noun of Pronoun

intrinsic_possession.notes: Used for naturally or inherently possessed items such as body parts and name. | Do NOT use 'ngandi' for intrinsic possession.; Apply vowel contraction rules when vowels meet.

contraction_rules.structure: {"o_plus_e": {"pattern": "o + e", "result": "e'e", "example": "Volo ne → Vole'e"}, "e_plus_e": {"pattern": "e + e", "result": "e'e", "example": "Le ne → Le'e"}, "o_plus_i": {"pattern": "o + i", "result": "o'o", "example": "Volo ni → Volo'o"}, "i_plus_i": {"pattern": "i + i", "result": "o'o", "example": "Ngandi ni → Ngando'o"}, "i_plus_e": {"pattern": "i + e", "result": "e'e", "example": "Ngandi ne → Ngande'e"}, "o_plus_o": {"pattern": "o + o", "result": "o'", "example": "Volo ŋo → Volo'ŋ"}, "e_plus_o": {"pattern": "e + o", "result": "e'", "example": "Le ŋo → Le'ŋ"}}

yi_definition.notes: thing | Used with 'ngandi' for general possession.

orthography_rules.structure: Merged vowels are written as e'e or o'o.; Deleted vowels are marked with an apostrophe before ŋ.; Contraction is mandatory when vowel collision occurs.

error_constraints.structure: Do not treat pronouns as possessive adjectives.; Do not use 'ngandi' with intrinsic possession.; Do not omit 'ngandi' with external possessions.; Do not ignore vowel contraction rules.; Do not leave vowel collisions unresolved.
